title: Stinky Egg
description: A simple resourcepack that replaces the default Dragon Egg model with a more Sniffer-like Egg!
body:
## Stinky Egg
Stinky Egg is a vanilla-adjacent resource pack with the goal of making the Dragon Egg fit the game's modern style.

## Changes as of v1.1
- Dragon Egg re-model
- Dragon Egg re-texture
- Dragon Egg model display


## What's next?
- Sniffer Egg model display
- Turtle Egg model display

**For updates you can follow me on [Bluesky](https://bsky.app/profile/8onfire.com)!** I'm the creator of #mcartday, as well as a Game Texture Artist, 3D Model Artist, 3D Animator, Gameplay Designer, and Content Creator in the Minecraft Space.

**Like this resource pack? You can donate me on [Kofi](https://ko-fi.com/8onfire) to help support more projects like this!**
